summary: Mobile App (React Native/Expo) testing completed. Fixed 2 bugs: jackpot API endpoint and bids_balance field mapping. All backend APIs working (11/11 tests passed). Mobile app UI fully functional - Login, Home, Auctions, and Profile screens all working correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Jackpot API endpoint was wrong (/wheel/jackpot instead of /excitement/global-jackpot)
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed jackpotAPI.getStatus() to use correct endpoint /excitement/global-jackpot

bugs_fixed.issue: Bids balance showing 0 because code used user.bids instead of user.bids_balance
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use user?.bids_balance || user?.bids || 0 in welcome banner and stats section

mobile_app_ui_tests.login_screen: PASS - Logo, inputs, login button all working
mobile_app_ui_tests.home_screen: PASS - Welcome banner, jackpot, auctions, stats all visible
mobile_app_ui_tests.profile_screen: PASS - User info, stats, menu items, logout button visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile app (React Native/Expo) is fully functional. Running on port 3001 as Expo Web preview. All screens working: Login, Home, Auctions, Profile. Two bugs were fixed: jackpot API endpoint and bids_balance field mapping.
